title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 217.680 - Offices, where located — space in correctional centers to be provided for hearings and interviews
text:
217.680.  Offices, where located — space in correctional centers to be provided for hearings and interviews. — 1.  The office and headquarters of the board shall not be located on the site of any correctional center.
  2.  Correctional centers shall provide to the board and its employees suitable space for interviews and hearings with offenders in the administration buildings of the correctional center.
(L. 1982 H.B. 1196 § 121, A.L. 1989 H.B. 408, A.L. 1995 H.B. 424)
